differences.title: 1. INITIAL LOAD
differences.leftDesc: Resumability hydrates instantly without re-executing framework code.
differences.rightDesc: Sends HTML from server, hydrates on client.

differences.title: 2. HYDRATION
differences.leftDesc: No initial JavaScript execution, state is restored.
differences.rightDesc: Client executes JS to make UI interactive.

differences.title: 3. STATE MANAGEMENT
differences.rightDesc: Global state accessible via React Context.

differences.title: 4. ROUTING
differences.rightDesc: Leverages nested routes for data loading.

differences.title: 5. DATA LOADING
differences.rightDesc: Use `loader` functions on server, `useFetcher` on client.

differences.title: 6. BUILD SIZE
differences.leftDesc: Minimal framework JavaScript shipped to the client.

differences.title: 7. PERFORMANCE
differences.leftDesc: Blazing fast initial page loads due to resumability.
differences.rightDesc: Excellent perceived performance with server rendering.
